Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1400 "MOONBUGGY-C000-1400" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $c000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Moon Buggy.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $C000 which fills the tape buffer with spaces to allow the score and highscore area to display correctly. It then jumps to the entry point at $1400 (it couldn't use RTS because of the overwriting of the boot code).
The loading screen is from the Spectrum version
